title: CSS Variables and Mixins Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of the essential properties and tools for creating modular, programmatically-advanced CSS using preprocessors.

questions.question: Which of these is the most modern and recommended way to build a reusable design system in CSS?
options: Table Layouts
Float Layouts
Combining CSS Variables and SASS Mixins
Absolute Positioning only

questions.question: Which of these is a major 'Pro' of using a Mixin compared to a regular CSS class?
options: It makes your CSS files smaller automatically.
It allows you to pass 'Arguments' (like a background color) to reuse the same logic with different values.
It is always supported by every browser.
It replaces the need for any HTML5 tags.

questions.question: What is the primary role of 'CSS Variables' (Custom Properties) in a modern design system?
options: To make the site load much faster.
To provide a single central source for atomic values (like colors or spacing) that can be easily updated and themed.
To choose the colors for the animation.
To automatically stop the animation halfway.

questions.question: In a SASS environment, which keyword is used to use a pre-defined mixin inside another CSS rule?
options: @mixin
@include
@extend
@import

questions.question: What is the primary benefit of creating atomic design tokens as CSS Variables instead of hardcoding values?
options: It makes your CSS files smaller automatically.
It allows for 'live' updates and easy theming at runtime (like Dark Mode).
It is always supported by every browser.
It replaces the need for any HTML5 tags.
